---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the use case or gap this addresses.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. If it's an API change, sketch the request/response shape.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you didn't prefer them.

## Additional context

Related issues, links, or prior art (e.g. is this already tracked in ROADMAP.md?).
